title: atalantia roxburghiana var. kerrii
intro: Atalantia roxburghiana var. kerrii, also known as Thai bitters or Krating Daeng, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, commonly used in Southeast Asian traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The leaves and fruits of this plant are rich in antioxidants and contain compounds like limonoids and coumarins, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Atalantia roxburghiana var. kerrii include its ability to aid digestion, relieve fever, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and protect against cancer. Atalantia roxburghiana var. kerrii is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tonics, which are traditionally consumed to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
